name: the-master-and-margarita
description: Mikhail Bulgakov's The Master and Margarita — a satirical masterpiece about the Devil in Moscow, the story of Pontius Pilate, and a love story about courage, cowardice, and the power of art.
useCase: Speaking truth to power, love as total commitment, the artist vs society, facing cowardice, understanding evil, finding your voice.
knownRisks: The novel's multiple timelines and narrative layers can be challenging
The Soviet satire requires some historical context to fully appreciate
Some translations differ significantly — the Ginsburg translation is one of several
